description: No dynamic import fallback for CodeMirror module load failure. REQ-001 edge case states: 'If CodeMirror modules fail to import (dynamic import error), fall back: do not enter edit mode, log error to console, no crash.' The implementation uses static imports at feedRowEditMode.ts:13-15 for EditorView, EditorState, and markdown(). If any of these fail at bundle time or runtime, the entire module fails to load with no graceful fallback. A dynamic import() with try/catch is required to satisfy this edge case.

secondaryEvidence.description: Spec edge case: 'If CodeMirror modules fail to import (dynamic import error), fall back: do not enter edit mode, log error to console, no crash'
